subcodes.first_line: O thou Father of Virtues! The detailed manuscripts and complete letters from the journey to New York emanate from Green Akka [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابی الفضائل دستخطهای مفصله و نامه های مکمل در سفر نیورک از گرین عکا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @contention and conflict, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
